title: AI Cover Letter Bot
shortDesc: LLM-based system that generates tailored cover letters from job descriptions.
fullDesc: Production-deployed LLM application that generates tailored cover letters by analyzing job descriptions and resumes. Built with structured prompt engineering and deployed on AWS Elastic Beanstalk.

title: AskSheets AI
shortDesc: Conversational AI for querying spreadsheet data using natural language.
fullDesc: Cloud-deployed conversational AI system enabling natural language queries over spreadsheet data. Implements structured parsing and LLM-powered insights generation.

title: DreamCatcher
shortDesc: AI-powered dream interpretation platform using LLMs.
fullDesc: LLM-based dream analysis platform that interprets user-submitted sleep dreams. Extracts emotional tone, symbolic patterns, and recurring themes using structured prompt engineering. Deployed on Render.

title: OrderBot
fullDesc: Production-style AI ordering assistant with structured conversational flows and backend architecture. Deployed on AWS Elastic Beanstalk.

title: RAG Assistant
fullDesc: RAG-based AI system implementing document chunking, embeddings, vector similarity search, and context-aware responses. Fully deployed on AWS Elastic Beanstalk.
